title: Axon to Release Second Quarter 2022 Earnings on August 9, 2022
text: SCOTTSDALE, Ariz. , July 27, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Axon (Nasdaq: AXON), the global leader in connected public safety technologies, today announced that it will report second quarter 2022 financial results after the market closes on Tuesday, August 9, 2022.

title: Axon: A Potentially Stunning Investment
text: Axon is a dominant player in both the hardware and software markets for law enforcement. The company has the best mission statement I've seen: 'to protect life'.
